prompt: Create a vertical anime-style cyberpunk portrait set inside a glowing public aquarium, featuring a slim androgynous young man with messy silver-white layered hair seated in three-quarter profile facing right, with the face deliberately obscured by one large opaque muted lavender square centered over the head. The character wears a glossy black high-collar futuristic jacket with zipper details, straps, and thin cyan neon light strips on the sleeves and back. Behind him is a floor-to-ceiling reef tank filled with saturated deep blue water, magenta and violet reflections, bright aquarium glass highlights, and dense coral scenery in pink, orange, red, lavender, and peach. Include exactly 22 visible fish: 5 orange-and-white clownfish clustered mostly along the left and lower-left reef, 2 bright blue tang fish on the left side, 1 larger orange fish near the center-left, 1 small yellow fish near the lower center, and 13 small pink-orange fish scattered across the upper and middle water. Include exactly 9 prominent coral clusters: 2 branching orange coral clusters on the left, 3 pink branching coral clusters along the lower half, 1 pale lavender coral cluster at the bottom-left, 1 glowing purple coral cluster near the top-left, 1 pale blue-white coral cluster behind the character, and 1 small orange coral cluster near the lower center. Use dramatic rim lighting from the aquarium, high contrast, luminous cyan and violet highlights on the jacket and hair, detailed strand-by-strand hair rendering, glossy glass reflections, rich saturated colors, cinematic depth, and an ultra-polished Japanese anime illustration style. Keep the composition portrait-oriented 3:4, with the character occupying the right half and the reef tank filling the left and background. No text, no watermark, no photorealism.
